business_question: Which stores are experiencing the highest stockout events?
business_context: Store operations teams want to reduce lost sales caused by inventory shortages.
chain_of_thought: Step 1: Aggregate lost revenue by store.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    STORE_ID,
    COUNT(*) AS STOCKOUT_COUNT,
    SUM(LOST_SALES_AMOUNT) AS LOST_REVENUE
FROM CONVERSA_DEMO.CLOTHING_RETAIL.FACT_STOCKOUT_EVENT
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY LOST_REVENUE DESC;
